title: peucedanum sewerzowii
intro: Peucedanum sewerzowii, also known as Sichuan angelica, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Peucedanum sewerzowii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower fever and improve circulation. Peucedanum sewerzowii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, and it may also be used in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
